message:
refactor(layout): replace recursive cycle_removal_dfs_back with iterative stack-based traversal

- Rewrite the recursive visit() function inside cycle_removal_dfs_back
  to an iterative stack-based DFS that tracks (node, edge_index) pairs,
  eliminating stack overflow risk on deeply cyclic graphs while
  preserving identical back-edge detection and reversed_edge_indexes
  output

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
